TextView.android:text:
Tracking Your Progress

1. Set Measurable Goals
Use numbers to track improvements like weight or reps.

2. Take Weekly Photos
Visual comparisons show physical changes over time.

3. Keep a Fitness Journal
Log workouts, meals, and how you feel each day.

4. Measure Body Stats
Track weight, waist, and other body measurements weekly.

5. Use a Fitness App
Apps help log and visualize your daily progress.

6. Track Sleep Quality
Good sleep is essential for recovery and growth.

7. Monitor Energy Levels
Note how your stamina improves week by week.

8. Celebrate Milestones
Reward yourself when you hit a new personal best.

9. Review Weekly
Spend a few minutes each Sunday reviewing your week.

10. Stay Patient and Consistent
Progress takes time, trust the process and keep going.
